docs: Fix ticketing documentation against implementation audit (#115)

* docs: Fix ticketing documentation against implementation audit

Compared ticketing docs against ext-ticketing, dr-engine/general, and
legion_extension_manager implementations. Fixes bugs, adds missing
features, and removes incorrect claims.

Bug fixes:
- Remove broken D&R get_ticket_count detection example (op: extension
  does not exist as a detection operator, and YAML had duplicate keys)
- Fix create_ticket D&R example to use correct parameters (detection
  object + severity override instead of flat fields)
- Remove false claim that escalation_group is a list filter parameter
- Remove unimplemented --group-by CLI example from reports

Missing documentation added:
- ingestion_mode config (all vs tailored) with full D&R rule examples
- ingest_detection extension action for tailored mode
- sensor_id query parameter for listing tickets
- create_ticket parameter table (detection object, severity override)
- get_ticket_count parameter table (status, severity filters)
- Empty investigation ticket creation (omitting detection)
- WebSocket real-time updates endpoint (GET /api/v1/ws)
- Rate limiting (20 req/s sustained, burst of 50)
- auto_close_resolved_after_days set-to-0-to-disable note

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: Fix D&R examples to use gjson paths instead of Go templates

Code review found that the create_ticket D&R example used Go template
syntax ({{ .routing }}) which stringifies nested objects. The D&R engine
resolves bare strings as gjson paths which correctly preserves object
structure.

Also fixed get_ticket_count: literal string values like
"new,acknowledged,in_progress" can't be passed via D&R response actions
(they'd be resolved as gjson paths and silently dropped). Changed to
REST API example matching the conventions in using-extensions.md.

Fixed api.limacharlie.io domain (was incorrectly app.limacharlie.io)
and request format (form data, not JSON body).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
docs: Fix AI Sessions documentation to match implementation (#114)

* docs: Fix AI Sessions documentation to match implementation

Audit against ai-sessions and dr-engine/general codebases found multiple
discrepancies between documentation and implementation.

Fixes:
- Action name: `start ai session` -> `start ai agent` (matches dr-engine case)
- Add missing `definition` mode (hive://ai_agent/) for D&R rules
- Add missing `lc_uid_secret` parameter documentation
- Fix session states: pending/terminated/failed -> starting/running/ended
- Fix end reasons: remove process_crashed, add failed/ttl_expired/org_api_requested
- Fix `one_shot` default: document as `true` for D&R sessions (not `false`)
- Note `profile_name` limitation for D&R/API sessions
- Add missing profile fields to user-sessions: ttl_seconds, one_shot, environment
- Document hibernation/dormancy behavior for user sessions
- Fix stale status values in api-reference.md and sdk.md examples
- Add debounce_key override support in definition mode
- Add Example 5 showing definition mode usage

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* docs: Fix review errors in AI Sessions documentation

Self-review found inaccuracies in the previous commit:

- Revert OAuth polling status back to "pending" (not "waiting")
- Revert API field "terminated_at" (not "ended_at") to match SessionResponse JSON tags
- Revert terminate response to "terminated: true" (not "ended")
- Fix EndReason values to match actual code assignments:
  - Remove "timeout", "ttl_expired", "cancelled" (never set in codebase)
  - Add "job_completed", "max_duration_exceeded", "startup_timeout",
    "heartbeat_stale" (actually set in code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

---------

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
Add RSI cap, breakeven stop, and time stop to day trading strategy

New parameters:
- dt_max_rsi (72): skip entry if RSI already overbought — avoids buying exhausted moves
- dt_breakeven_pct (0.5%): slide stop to entry once up 0.5% — scratch losers, not losers
- dt_time_stop_candles (20): close losing trade after 20 candles — free up capital

Updated defaults for better R:R (0.75% risk / 2% reward = 2.67:1):
- dt_price_rise_pct: 2.0 → 1.5%  (catch more valid moves)
- dt_lookback_candles: 3 → 5     (cleaner signal over 5 candles)
- dt_volume_mult: 1.5 → 2.0×     (stronger volume confirmation)
- dt_trailing_stop_pct: 1.0 → 0.75%  (tighter for short timeframes)
- dt_take_profit_pct: 3.0 → 2.0%     (more achievable target)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix package-lock.json sync issue

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add The Mirror Series: 3 playbooks for narcissist self-healing

New series "The Mirror Series" — the counterpart to The Shield Series.
Written for the narcissist who wants to heal. Three playbooks with 12
original mental models:

1. The Hermit Crab's Shell (Recognition): Shell Catalog, Soft Body Map,
   Four Species interactive assessment, Naked Minute protocol
2. The Scorpion's Molt (Deconstruction): Seven Skins defense stack,
   Controlled Crack protocol, Soft Hour teneral state, Intentional Armor
3. The Vampire Squid's Light (Rebuilding): Supply Map, The Misname,
   Photophore exercises (Somatic Anchor, Made Thing, Earned Regard),
   four-zone Ascent protocol

Includes landing pages, route registration, seed data (tags, connections,
reading path), and pull quote entries for all 3 playbooks.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
feat: add spaCy-style token pattern query engine (query.py)

- VerseMatcher: multi-pattern matching across verses with named keys
  and alternative patterns per key
- Pattern attributes: TEXT, LOWER, LEMMA, POS, DEP, ROOT, ARC
- Attribute values: exact string, list (any-of), dict (IN/NOT_IN/REGEX)
- Quantifiers via OP: ? * + ! (optional, zero+, one+, negation)
- NOT_ prefix shorthand for negating any attribute
- SKIP: proximity gap — allow up to N tokens between two elements
- search() lazily streams over surah, pre-computed docs, or all 6236 verses
- Convenience functions: find_by_root, find_by_lemma, find_by_pos,
  find_near, find_verses, concordance (KWIC)
- 63 tests, all passing (140 total across test suite)
- README: new "Token Pattern Queries" section with full examples

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Harden CI: add lint, integration tests, fix Go version

commit.message:
Add Big Mitch's World - immersive 3D ML trading visualization

Features:
- Sims-style status HUD with Energy, Focus, Confidence, Wealth bars
- Interactive objects with hover glow and click action menus
- Big Mitch wanders around and walks to objects when interacting
- Lavish lifestyle items: Lambo, motorbike, pool table, arcade game, vinyl setup
- Wall-mounted paintings with trading quotes and neon signs
- Minimap showing room layout and Big Mitch's position
- 7 themed rooms for different ML pipeline stages (Gate, Patterns, ML, etc.)
- Live stats panel showing trades, win rate, profit factor

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add Day Trade strategy alongside Momentum

Two selectable strategies via tabs in the Trading Rules panel:

MOMENTUM (existing):
- RSI pullback + cross, ADX trend strength, volume/MACD/body filters
- ATR-based stops, partial TP1 + EMA trail exit, R-multiple target

DAY TRADE (new):
- Entry: price rose X% over N candles + volume confirmation + above EMA20
- Exit: full position at take profit %; trailing stop rolls up with price
- Parameters: price rise %, lookback candles, volume mult, trail %, TP %

Shared sections (risk sizing, pairs, timeframe) visible for both strategies.
Strategy persists in rules file and is logged on change.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

docs: freeze phase 1 CLI contract

Add IndexedDB caching layer for faster loads

- CSCL segments cached 30 days (street geometry never changes)
- ASP signs cached 7 days (regulations rarely change)
- Historical sweep data cached 12 hours
- Viewport grid-cell dedup prevents redundant fetches on pan
- Return visits skip geocoding, restore directly from saved block
- Realtime scanner only re-queries unswept segments on rescan

chore: point POC synthesis at local proxy

Switch the Node.js prototype to the local proxy endpoint and GPT-5.4 model so synthesis runs against the configured local relay instead of the Anthropic API directly.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: add _analyze_workflow helper for workflow graph analysis

Add a private helper that parses ComfyUI API-format workflows into
structured data: topological node ordering, model extraction, sampler
parameter extraction, prompt/negative node detection, and pipeline
type heuristic (txt2img, img2img, upscale). This is the foundation
for the upcoming summarize_workflow tool.

commit.message:
Handle mobile clipboard paste with HTML image extraction

Mobile browsers often copy images as HTML rather than raw blobs.
Now extracts img src from HTML clipboard content and fetches the
image. Falls back to helpful error messages.

commit.message:
Performance: fix N+1 queries, add query limits, optimize admin routes

- Trial reminders: batch fetch owners instead of per-studio loop (N+1 → 2 queries)
- Data hooks: add .limit() to 10 hooks to prevent unbounded fetches
- Admin studios: scope account fetch to studio IDs, select only needed columns
- Sidebar: replace native img with next/image for optimization

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: optimize memory context formatting with MemoryFormatter style

- Add structured format with 【语义关联事实】【逻辑关系图谱】【最近对话】
- Mark latest vs historical records with tag tracking
- Use (head) --[relation]--> (tail) format for relations
- Extract [USER]/[ASSISTANT] prefixes from raw logs

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: set data root to rag-anything/rag-anything/ to match web-server behaviour

_PKG_ROOT now resolves to RAG_LUND/rag-anything/rag-anything/, so
rag_workspace, output and logs land in the same directory that the
web server (uvicorn from rag-anything/) has always written to.
Both local_rag CLI and the web server now share identical paths
regardless of working directory.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Hide paste hint on mobile — only show on desktop

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add chat message validation and signup rate limiting

- Chat: Zod schema with 5000 char limit, UUID validation on channel_id
- Signup: rate limit 3 attempts per IP per 15 minutes
- Prevents message flooding and mass account creation

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Architects write verification checks during debate phase

For COMPLEX tasks, each architect now adds domain-specific verification
checks during the debate:
- Frontend: browser checks (pages, elements, interactions)
- Backend: spec checks (files, exports, API contracts)
- Systems: CI checks (build, types, tests, conventions)

Lead compiles these into VERIFICATION_PLAN.md after convergence,
producing a more thorough plan than Lead writing it alone.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix: убрать Unicode emoji — заменить на ASCII/кириллицу

Символы ★ ✕ 📦 ▶ ⏳ 🔄 🏠 🃏 🎯 🏆 🌦 🔗 ⏭ ломались в веб-версии
(системный шрифт браузера не поддерживает эти кодовые точки).
Все заменены на ASCII или кириллицу без потери смысла.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix ERROR connection badge and unbound rules variable

- Wrap client.test_connection() in try/except so Binance errors return
  a graceful JSON response instead of a 500 that shows ERROR in the UI
- Initialise rules before the loop so it's always defined for the sleep
  calculation even if an exception fires before rules = load_rules(...)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix paste: use native paste event instead of Clipboard API

Clipboard API read() is blocked on iOS Safari. Now listens for native
paste events (Ctrl+V / Cmd+V on desktop, long-press paste on mobile).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add YouTube URL support and fix review page evaluation 404 bug

- Add YouTube download pipeline: info, download, status polling endpoints
- Add YouTube URL tab to new project page
- Fix review page crash: getEvaluation threw on Korean 404 message
  ("평가 데이터가 없습니다") instead of returning null, causing
  Promise.all to reject and segments to not load
- Switch avid provider from codex to claude
- Fix job_runner email crash: use .limit(1) instead of .single()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat: major sequencer and mixer overhaul

Sequencer:
- Add 4 new synthesisers: Lead, FM, Pluck, Chord Stab — each with presets, on/off toggle, parameter sliders, generator
- Add Elektron Drum 2 (Digitakt-style) with Mute/Solo per track, Tune/Decay params, Generator
- Move Sample Pads directly under Elektron Drum 2
- Extend Juno Poly Synth and Pluck Synth to 32 steps with independent step counters and 2-bar grid layout
- Fix Pluck synth silence (rewrite to additive synthesis; fix octave shift bug)
- Fix Elektron Drum 2 Mute/Solo (scheduler was ignoring flags)
- Fix Juno Bar 2 buttons missing (pad step arrays to 32 defensively in store and render)
- Add Zustand store (useProjectStore) with full persistence

Mixer:
- Complete redesign: all 10 instruments + master represented
- Rotary knobs (H, M, L, DLY, REV) stacked vertically per channel
- Vertical fader with rectangular mixing-desk-style thumb
- Real-time VU bars via AnalyserNode + requestAnimationFrame RMS metering with peak hold
- Fix RotaryKnob drag (stable refs pattern — no longer drops events on store updates)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Restructure metadata.json: flat array -> tag/set/images nested format

- Auto-migrate legacy flat array format on first startup
- Add NestedMetadata/NestedTagBlock/NestedSetBlock types

commit.message:
Force CSS/JS cache bust via versioned URLs (?v=8)

Old SW was serving stale css/app.css from cache regardless of SW
version bumps. Adding ?v=8 to CSS and JS links in index.html forces
even old SWs to fetch fresh files (cache miss on new URL).
Also: theme-color updated to #ffffff for light mode, sw cache v8.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

refactor: unify tool interface and message routing

- Add 'to' field to InboundMessage for routing

- Remove 'to' from tool return format, always route through LLM
- Delete ToolEvent class, use send_message instead
- Remove old channel files (claude_channel, claude_mcp, email)
- Add dynamic channel detection from config for memory
- Fix CLI to filter messages by 'to' field
